ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date on which the match was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league or tournament */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the umpire */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "pitch_conditions" TEXT /* State of the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the innings is part of */,
  "team_batting" TEXT /* Name of the team batting */,
  "team_bowling" TEXT /* Name of the team bowling */,
  "innings_number" INTEGER /* Number of the innings (1 or 2) */,
  "target_runs" INTEGER /* Runs needed to win for the batting team in the second innings */,
  "Declared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the innings was declared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the innings the ball is part of */,
  "ball_number" TEXT /* Number of the ball in the over (e.g., 0.1, 0.2) */,
  "batsman" TEXT /* Name of the batsman */,
  "bowler" TEXT /* Name of the bowler */,
  "non_striker" TEXT /* Name of the non-striker */,
  "batsman_run" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the batsman */,
  "extras_run" INTEGER /* Extras runs (e.g., wides, no-balls) */,
  "total_run" INTEGER /* Total runs scored on the ball */,
  "wicket" INTEGER /* Number of wickets (1 if a wicket falls, 0 otherwise) */,
  "fielders" TEXT /* Fielders involved in the wicket (if any) */,
  "wicket_kind" TEXT /* Type of wicket (e.g., caught, bowled, stumped) */,
  "player_out" TEXT /* Name of the player out (if any) */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Number of the over */,
  "ball_type" TEXT /* Type of ball (e.g., no-ball, wide) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Outcome of any review (e.g., Upheld, Overturned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_non_striker FOREIGN KEY ("non_striker") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_bowler FOREIGN KEY ("bowler") REFERENCES players ("player_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_innings_id FOREIGN KEY ("innings_id") REFERENCES innings ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_batsman FOREIGN KEY ("batsman") REFERENCES players ("player_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-hand bat, left-hand bat) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of seats) */,
  "opened" TEXT /* Date when the venue was opened */,
  "venue_surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface at the venue */,
  "venue_end_names" TEXT /* Names of the ends at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
